channel.title: AP News - US News
channel.description: Top US News stories from AP News

item.title: ‘Right under our noses and nobody was able to help them.’ 16 kids found in squalor shocks Ohio town
item.description: The discovery of 16 siblings living in deplorable conditions in rural Ohio has left people wondering why the life-threatening squalor wasn’t detected earlier.

item.title: ICE arrests 10,000 in 5 days, a sharp late-June surge in Trump’s deportation push
A grand jury indicts Louisiana’s attorney general in a fight over changes to New Orleans courts
